hero.headline: Unleash Your Strength on the Pole
hero.subheadline: Build confidence, strength, and artistry through pole dance. Whether you are a total beginner or looking to master advanced tricks, our studio has a program for you.

about.heading: About Me
about.body: Certified pole dance instructor and competitor with over 8 years of teaching experience. My mission is to make pole dance accessible to all body types and fitness levels — no gymnastics background required, just the courage to try something new.

items.name: Jessica R.
items.text: I was terrified of trying pole dance, but the Basics course broke everything down so clearly. I can now do a fireman spin and I feel incredible!

items.name: Mia T.
items.text: The spins and transitions course completely changed my flow. I went from clunky moves to smooth, connected sequences in just a few weeks.

items.name: Priya D.
items.text: Advanced Pole Tricks pushed me beyond what I thought was possible. The detailed progressions for each trick made even the scary inversions feel safe.

items.q: Do I need to be strong to start?
items.a: Not at all! Pole Basics is designed for complete beginners. You will build strength as you progress through the lessons. Everyone starts somewhere.
You will need a pole (static or spinning) installed securely at home or access to a local studio. Wear shorts and a tank top so your skin can grip the pole.

items.q: Can I access the courses on mobile?
items.a: Yes! The platform is fully responsive. You can stream lessons on your phone, tablet, or computer — perfect for following along in your practice space.

items.q: How long do I have access to the courses?
items.a: Once you enroll, you get lifetime access to the course material. Rewatch lessons as many times as you like and progress at your own pace.

COURSES.title: Pole Basics
COURSES.description: A beginner-friendly introduction to pole dance fundamentals. Learn proper grip, basic spins, floor work, and essential conditioning exercises to build your foundation safely.

lessons.title: Introduction to Pole Dance
lessons.content_html:
Welcome to the world of pole dance! In this opening lesson we cover the history, styles, and safety essentials you need before touching the pole.

Key takeaways

  • Understand the different pole dance styles — sport, exotic, and artistic
  • Learn pole safety and skin preparation basics
  • Set up your practice area for safe training

lessons.title: Grip & Conditioning
lessons.content_html:
A strong grip is everything in pole dance. This lesson covers different grip techniques and conditioning drills to build the hand, arm, and core strength you need.

Key takeaways

  • Master basic grip, cup grip, and split grip
  • Build forearm endurance with targeted drills
  • Develop core strength for safe pole holds

lessons.title: Floor Work Fundamentals
lessons.content_html:
Floor work adds sensuality and grace to your pole practice. Learn body rolls, transitions to and from the floor, and flowing movements that connect your spins.

Key takeaways

  • Perform smooth descents from standing to floor
  • Execute body waves and floor rolls with fluidity
  • Connect floor work to pole transitions seamlessly

lessons.title: First Spins — Fireman & Chair
lessons.content_html:
Time to leave the ground! The fireman spin and chair spin are the gateway moves of pole dance. We break them down step by step with safety spotting tips.

Key takeaways

  • Execute a clean fireman spin on both sides
  • Perform the chair spin with proper leg extension
  • Land safely and control momentum

lessons.title: Basic Spin Combination
lessons.content_html:
Put your new skills together in a flowing combination that links floor work, fireman spin, chair spin, and a graceful dismount.

Key takeaways

  • Chain beginner spins into a seamless sequence
  • Add floor work transitions between spins
  • Perform with confidence and expression

COURSES.title: Spins & Transitions
COURSES.description: Level up your pole dance with intermediate spins, creative transitions, and linking techniques. Learn to flow between moves with grace and build routines that look effortless.

lessons.title: Attitude Spin & Variations
lessons.content_html:
The attitude spin is an elegant intermediate move that opens up many creative variations. Learn the proper entry, body line, and exit techniques.

Key takeaways

  • Execute a clean attitude spin with extended leg line
  • Explore inside and outside variations
  • Transition smoothly from attitude into other moves

lessons.title: Fan Kick & Hook Spin
lessons.content_html:
Dynamic fan kicks and hook spins add power and visual drama to your repertoire. We cover momentum generation and controlled landings.

Key takeaways

  • Generate momentum for fan kicks safely
  • Perform the hook spin with proper knee placement
  • Control speed and landing on both sides

lessons.title: Spin-to-Spin Transitions
lessons.content_html:
The magic of pole dance is in the transitions. Learn how to flow from one spin directly into another without stopping, creating a mesmerising continuous sequence.

Key takeaways

  • Link spins without pausing or resetting grip
  • Use momentum from one spin to enter the next
  • Create visual variety with direction changes

lessons.title: Climbing & Sitting on the Pole
lessons.content_html:
Going vertical! Learn the basic climb, cross-ankle hold, and how to sit securely on the pole — the gateway to all aerial tricks.

Key takeaways

  • Climb the pole with proper technique and grip
  • Sit securely with a strong cross-ankle hold
  • Transition from climb to sit to spin smoothly

lessons.title: Intermediate Combination Flow
lessons.content_html:
Bring everything together in a flowing intermediate combination that showcases spins, transitions, a climb, and expressive floor work set to music.

Key takeaways

  • Perform a multi-spin combination with clean transitions
  • Incorporate a climb and sit into your routine
  • Express musicality through movement and pauses

COURSES.title: Advanced Pole Tricks
COURSES.description: Push your limits with inversions, advanced holds, and show-stopping tricks. This course covers shoulder mounts, laybacks, and aerial combinations for confident intermediate dancers ready to level up.

lessons.title: Inversions 101
lessons.content_html:
Going upside down is a milestone in every pole dancer's journey. We cover the chopper and crucifix entries with detailed safety progressions.

Key takeaways

  • Safely enter a basic inversion using the chopper
  • Build the core strength needed for controlled inversions
  • Spot yourself and know when you are ready to progress

lessons.title: Shoulder Mount Technique
lessons.content_html:
The shoulder mount is one of the most impressive strength moves in pole dance. Learn the proper shoulder placement, engagement, and pressing technique.

Key takeaways

  • Position the shoulder correctly against the pole
  • Engage lats and core for a controlled lift
  • Transition from shoulder mount into aerial poses

lessons.title: Laybacks & Extended Holds
lessons.content_html:
Laybacks create stunning visual lines and require trust in your grip and body awareness. We build up from seated laybacks to full aerial extensions.

Key takeaways

  • Perform a secure seated layback with proper grip
  • Extend into aerial layback with controlled release
  • Create beautiful lines with pointed toes and arm placement

lessons.title: Aerial Combos
lessons.content_html:
Link your tricks in the air! Learn to transition between inversions, holds, and spins without coming down to the ground.

Key takeaways

  • Chain inversions into holds without descending
  • Use momentum and grip changes for aerial flow
  • Build endurance for sustained aerial sequences

lessons.title: Show-Stopping Routine
lessons.content_html:
Your capstone routine! Combine inversions, shoulder mounts, laybacks, spins, and floor work into a breathtaking performance piece.

Key takeaways

  • Perform a complete advanced pole routine
  • Blend power tricks with graceful transitions
  • Express artistry and confidence on the pole
